title: Russia’s Alfa Bank plans to launch digital depository to offer crypto services: report
snippet: The move aligns with similar announcements from other major Russian banks, amid the development of the country's crypto law.

title: Sony Bank Clears OCC Hurdle for Dollar Stablecoin
snippet: The lender's new US subsidiary, Connectia Trust, would issue a dollar-pegged stablecoin once it clears the regulator's final conditions.

title: Swift launches blockchain ledger for tokenized deposit pilot with 17 banks
snippet: Swift launched a blockchain-based ledger that enables 17 banks to pilot 24/7 cross-border payments using tokenized deposits.

title: Sony Bank gets conditional OCC approval for US trust bank to issue dollar-backed stablecoin
snippet: The trust bank subsidiary, Connectia Trust, is expected to issue and manage a dollar-backed stablecoin, pending final approval.

title: Nium acquires crypto wallet Cypher
snippet: Nium, the global leader in cross-border payments infrastructure, today announced the acquisition of Cypher, a crypto-native non-custodial wallet and issuing company.

title: Nium Acquires Cypher to Bridge Fiat and Crypto
snippet: Nium has acquired Cypher to further develop Nium as the core infrastructure layer for compliant money movement and value exchange that bridges fiat and digital assets. title: Crypto VC Paradigm launches $1.2 billion AI fund as it broadens beyond digital assets
Sony Bank gets US regulator nod to issue stablecoins
snippet: Sony Bank received preliminary approval from the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency to establish a US stablecoin issuance business, with $40 million in starting capital.

title: Hyundai Card completes its first real-world stablecoin pilot with Avalanche, Tether
snippet: Visa and Circle will participate in Hyundai Card's second stablecoin PoC, which is set to begin later this month.

title: Sony Bank wins US regulatory approval for stablecoin trust bank
snippet: Japan’s Sony Bank has secured conditional approval from the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency to set up a US national trust bank subsidiary.

title: A 20-Year-Old's Crypto Wallet Moved $123M in Romance-Scam Cash: Interpol Says
snippet: The two Thai arrests were part of Operation First Light, a 97-country sweep that logged 5,811 arrests and intercepted $293 million.

title: Dinari, tZERO join forces on turnkey platform for tokenized U.S. equities
Nodu receives MiCA and Payment Institution licences from the Bank of Latvia
snippet: Nodu, the stablecoin payment infrastructure company, has been granted two licences by Latvijas Banka (the Bank of Latvia): a Crypto-Asset Service Provider (CASP) licence under the EU's Markets in Crypto-Assets Regulation (MiCA), and a payment institution licence.

title: Bank of Korea stands firm on bank-led stablecoin push as deposit token pilots advance
snippet: The Bank of Korea reiterated its call for bank-led won stablecoin issuance while advancing deposit token pilots, as issuer rules remain a sticking point in South Korea’s digital asset bill.

title: Banks to pilot live transactions on Swift's blockchain-based shared ledger
snippet: Seventeen banks from six countries are preparing to pilot live transactions on Swift's interoperable blockchain-based shared ledger, using tokenised deposits for 24/7 payment availability and better liquidity efficiency.

title: What Are the Biggest User Demands for Crypto Wallets in 2026?

title: Revolut says USDT delisting is limited to EEA, Switzerland
snippet: Revolut said USDT support remains unchanged outside EEA and Switzerland as it winds down the stablecoin offering in selected European markets.

title: Volt enables Profee wallet top-ups via USDC
snippet: Volt, the real-time, rail-agnostic money movement platform, has gone live with its stablecoin checkout for Profee, a Cyprus-based electronic money institution focusing on cross-currency money transfers.

title: Officials set to revise MiCA to cover non-EU stablecoin issuers: Report
snippet: EU officials reportedly plan to consider changes to the Markets in Crypto-Assets framework, dubbed by some as “MiCA 2.0,” in response to a US stablecoin law and rules on tokenized payments and deposits.

title: European Commission looks to expand MiCA to cover emergence of tokenization, non-EU stablecoin issuers: report
snippet: The European Commission is reportedly seeking comment from stakeholders on expanding MiCA rules until Sept. 30.

title: Binance Wallet adds Plume’s yield vault offering access to Invesco and Bitwise funds
snippet: Binance Wallet has added Plume's yield vault, giving users access to tokenized funds managed by Invesco and Bitwise.

title: The 5 types of real world assets being tokenized fastest onchain
snippet: Tokenized Real World Assets span treasuries, real estate, stocks, commodities and private credit. The sector is still small in TradFi terms but it's growing very, very fast.

title: Interpol operation exposes $122M crypto wallet tied to romance scam laundering
snippet: Interpol said a suspect's crypto wallet processed over $122.5 million in 10 months as authorities uncovered the scheme during a global anti-fraud operation that led to 5,811 arrests.

title: Kazakhstan president signs decree to accelerate crypto adoption
snippet: Kazakhstan targets gas-powered electricity for mining, income tax exemptions for regulated crypto transactions and cross-border stablecoin payments in a new decree signed by the president.

title: Hyundai Card completes stablecoin cross-border remittance PoC
snippet: Hyundai Card and Hyundai Motor Company have completed preparations for stablecoin-based cross-border remittances at a level that could be deployed between overseas corporate entities, moving beyond a simple technical verification stage.

title: BTC speculators in focus as analysis says 'textbook Bitcoin bottom' is underway
snippet: Analysis flagged a Bitcoin moving average derivative that last triggered at the end of the 2022 bear market as BTC price action returned to its reversal zone.
